title: xyris subtilis
intro: Xyris subtilis, also known as the small yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Xyris subtilis include its potential to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Xyris subtilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
